commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds a read-only Control UI Overview workspace-boundary card backed by a new `system.workspaceBoundaryStatus` gateway method, with related UI state wiring, docs, and a test prop update.

PR surface: Source +132, Tests +2, Docs +8. Total +142 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR adds a new Overview card and gateway method rather than fixing a reported broken existing behavior. The contributor supplied source-checkout runtime proof for the intended unavailable-state display.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can rebase this maintainer-modifiable branch onto current main and fix the gateway registry/type drift without choosing a new product direction.

target.title: feat(control-ui): add workspace boundary warning card with honest unavailable state
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a read-only Workspace Boundary status card to the Overview screen.

This introduces the zero-parameter gateway method `system.workspaceBoundaryStatus` and surfaces a conservative, honest unavailable state in the UI when an approved canonical-root runtime signal is not available.

## Scope

- Adds `system.workspaceBoundaryStatus`
- Uses `READ_SCOPE` only
- Adds Workspace Boundary card to Overview
- Places card after Cron and before conditional Model Auth
- Uses existing Overview Refresh path only
- Preserves conservative backend behavior:
  - `state: unavailable`
  - `reason: canonical_root_unavailable`
  - `canonical_root: null`
  - `boundary_scope: workspace-vs-canon`

## Safety boundaries

This PR does not add:

- workspace browsing
- file-level inspection
- remediation
- promotion
- approval controls
- task gating
- dashboarding
- polling
- passive refresh
- background refresh
- live monitoring
- new schemas
- new automation

## Verification

- Fast-forward merge verified locally
- Final local HEAD matched frozen commit:
  `a8a2f3aa23398f97966576e4e4790e1c54ca6a41`
- `corepack pnpm tsgo:core` passed with exit code 0
- Working tree remained clean after verification

## Notes

The method is intentionally conservative. It reports unavailable until an approved canonical-root runtime signal exists.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
Workspace Boundary card shows the honest unavailable state in the Overview screen instead of implying a healthy workspace boundary posture.

Real environment tested:
Real local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS at commit `a8a2f3aa23398f97966576e4e4790e1c54ca6a41`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
git branch --show-current
git rev-parse HEAD
git status --short --branch
corepack pnpm tsgo:core
corepack pnpm start
```

Evidence:
Verified from a real local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS.

Environment:
- Repository: `/Users/devinjmedia/AI/05_APPS/OpenClaw/openclaw`
- Commit: `a8a2f3aa23398f97966576e4e4790e1c54ca6a41`
- Branch: `main`
- Git status: `main...origin/main [ahead 1]`
- PR branch: `DeVisionLabs:workspace-boundary-warning-card-a8a2f3aa23`
- Runtime command: `corepack pnpm start`
- Typecheck command: `corepack pnpm tsgo:core`

Copied live terminal output:
```bash
$ git branch --show-current
main

$ git rev-parse HEAD
a8a2f3aa23398f97966576e4e4790e1c54ca6a41

$ git status --short --branch
 ## main...origin/main [ahead 1]

$ corepack pnpm tsgo:core
$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo

$ corepack pnpm start
```

Typecheck completed with no errors.

Runtime UI verification was performed from the running source checkout. The Overview screen loaded and displayed the new Workspace Boundary card with the expected conservative unavailable state.

Observed card content:
- Card label: `Workspace boundary`
- Card value: `Workspace boundary status unavailable`
- Card hint: `Current approved signals are not sufficient to safely determine workspace boundary posture.`
- Placement: after `Cron`, before conditional `Model Auth`
- Refresh behavior: uses the existing `Overview Refresh` path only

Observed result:
The Workspace Boundary card appears in the Overview screen and reports the honest unavailable state instead of a fake healthy state.

Confirmed absent in the running UI:
- Dedicated Workspace Boundary refresh button
- Polling
- Passive refresh
- Background refresh
- Live monitoring
- Remediation controls
- Approval controls
- Task gating
- Dashboarding
- Automation

No source files were modified during verification.

Not tested:
- Full canonical-root detection was not tested because no approved canonical-root runtime signal exists yet.
- Windows runtime behavior was not tested.
- Installed OpenClaw dist behavior was not tested because this verification intentionally used the durable source checkout only.
- Automated remediation, approval controls, task gating, dashboarding, polling, and automation were not tested because this PR intentionally does not add those capabilities.

### Evidence

Verified from a real local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS.

Environment:

- Repository: `/Users/devinjmedia/AI/05_APPS/OpenClaw/openclaw`
- Commit: `a8a2f3aa23398f97966576e4e4790e1c54ca6a41`
- Branch: `main`
- Git status: `main...origin/main [ahead 1]`
- PR branch: `DeVisionLabs:workspace-boundary-warning-card-a8a2f3aa23`
- Runtime command: `corepack pnpm start`
- Typecheck command: `corepack pnpm tsgo:core`

Copied live terminal output:

```bash
$ git branch --show-current
main

$ git rev-parse HEAD
a8a2f3aa23398f97966576e4e4790e1c54ca6a41

$ git status --short --branch
## main...origin/main [ahead 1]

$ corepack pnpm tsgo:core
$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo

$ corepack pnpm start
```

Typecheck completed with no errors.

Runtime UI verification was performed from the running source checkout. The Overview screen loaded and displayed the new Workspace Boundary card with the expected conservative unavailable state.

Observed card content:

- Card label: `Workspace boundary`
- Card value: `Workspace boundary status unavailable`
- Card hint: `Current approved signals are not sufficient to safely determine workspace boundary posture.`
- Placement: after `Cron`, before conditional `Model Auth`
- Refresh behavior: uses the existing `Overview Refresh` path only

### Observed Result

The Workspace Boundary card appears in the Overview screen and reports the honest unavailable state instead of a fake healthy state.

Confirmed absent in the running UI:

- Dedicated Workspace Boundary refresh button
- Polling
- Passive refresh
- Background refresh
- Live monitoring
- Remediation controls
- Approval controls
- Task gating
- Dashboarding
- Automation

No source files were modified during verification.

### Not Tested

- Full canonical-root detection was not tested because no approved canonical-root runtime signal exists yet.
- Windows runtime behavior was not tested.
- Installed OpenClaw dist behavior was not tested because this verification intentionally used the durable source checkout only.
- Automated remediation, approval controls, task gating, dashboarding, polling, and automation were not tested because this PR intentionally does not add those capabilities.
